content.en:
With this one of the First Dao Realms taking the lead, many other Supreme Dao Realms were about to withdraw.

There was no way, if they only fell to a few Dao realms, then it would be worth it for them to take some risks.

But in this situation, there are too many losses, maybe it will be their turn next, and they don't dare to continue.

Now.

Miao An's face was extremely gloomy, she spent such a big price to recruit this group of people, and even equipped them with two supreme dao armor weapons, what a big price she paid, and the treasures for them to heal their injuries were also used up a lot.

Nowadays, they want to go, how can it be so easy.

"Everyone, you have signed an agreement, it is impossible to leave now, if you are willing to go, I dare not guarantee that nothing will happen to your family. "

This is a clear threat.

But she is qualified to threaten.

In an instant, the Ichiju Dao Realm who had just said that they had withdrawn showed fear.

They knew that Miao An could really destroy their family and even erase the small forces behind them.

After all, they are all attached to Taisu Palace, and Miao An's mother is the palace master of Xuan Miao Palace, a powerhouse of the five-fold Dao realm, and a word can make them die without a place to be buried.

If you continue to help Miao'an, maybe you still have a chance to live, but if you resist, you will definitely die.

Seeing this, no one in the Dao Realm dared to say anything about leaving, but he was definitely dissatisfied in his heart.

Miao An also knew that she had offended these Supreme Dao Realms, but she didn't care, as long as she could win a place, everything was worth it.

"I have to go to my mother!"

Miao An came to Xuan Miao Palace and asked to see her mother, Xuan Miao Palace Master.

......

Soon, the master of the Xuanmiao Palace went out of the customs and met Miao'an's daughter.

"Miao'an, how is the trip to the Xuanlin Mountain Realm?"

The Xuan Miao Palace Lord asked.

"Mother, it's not going well!" Miao An bowed her head and said, "My daughter needs the support of her mother, otherwise I won't be able to get one of the six places." "

The Xuanmiao Palace Lord said lightly: "I have many heirs, and you are just one of them, and your talent potential is at most in the top five." If it weren't for your sisters competing for the Triple Supreme Dao Realm spot, you wouldn't have received any help from me. "

"Mother, daughter knows. "

Miao An responded.

The Xuanmiao Palace Master said again: "I can only give you another 30 first-tier supreme Dao realms and six second-tier supreme Dao realms at most, this is the limit!"

"Thank you, Mother!" Myoan thanked.

Then, Miao An left.

After a period of time, Miao An once again led a group of Supreme Dao Realm into the Xuanlin Mountain Realm.

......

Deep in the Xuanlin Mountain Boundary.

Ye Tian is gaining more and more, and he is also beginning to cultivate here, using the resources he has obtained to improve his cultivation, and his strength is steadily improving.

And he also obtained a lot of materials needed by Taisu Palace, if he gave the materials he obtained to Miao'an, he could easily let Miao'an get one of the six places, and he didn't need to take any more risks.

But he can't give Miao An, he has nothing to do with Miao An, there is no need to help him.

Moreover, it would also expose his existence.

In the blink of an eye, one after another years of solstice passed.

Miao An and other geniuses from the Taisu Palace to the Dao Realm did everything they could to collect the materials needed by the Taisu Palace in the Xuanlin Mountain Realm, and the day when the Taisu Palace would completely decide on the quota was getting closer and closer.

this day.

Taisu Palace, a special depths of time and space.

There are terrifying arrays arranged here, and even the Infinite Heavenly Palace can't explore this place.

It is also the only place where they can chat safely and without worrying about the content of the conversation being exposed.

At this time.

There were six sevenfold supreme realms discussing a matter.

"Everyone, this time the list of key cultivation is about to come out, once those Supreme Dao Realm geniuses have decided, in the name of cultivating them, send them out of the Infinite Domain!"

"This matter must be arranged, and now except for the seven of us, the rest of the Taisu Palace only thinks that it is to focus on cultivating these Dao Realm geniuses. But no one knows, we are just leaving a fire for Taisu Palace. "

"Taisu, do we really want to oppose the Wuji Heavenly Palace?"

Another Sevenfold Dao Realm said.

"It must be reversed, the Infinite Heavenly Palace is originally an outsider. In the primeval era, the Wuji Heavenly Palace invaded here and launched many battles with the local forces, and in the end, the Wuji Heavenly Palace won, occupied this place, and changed its name to the Wuji Domain, but who knows this history?"

"Now the Wuji Heavenly Palace is still promoting the war of the primeval era, it is they who resist foreign invasion, it's ridiculous!"

"Wuji Heavenly Palace has an eightfold supreme realm and twenty-three sevenfold supreme realms. But when we get together with the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm of other forces, we can also make up more than twenty Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms, and the only trouble is that Infinite Heavenly Emperor. But now, we already have a way to trap and even seal it, and there is still a thirty percent chance of overthrowing the Wuji Heavenly Palace!"

The probability of thirty percent is not high, which is why they want to send the fire of Taisu Palace out.

Of course, they could also choose not to overthrow the Infinite Heavenly Palace, but they had no choice!

In the next tens of thousands of Dao eras, a catastrophe will come, and with the style of Wuji Heavenly Palace, many big forces such as Taisu Palace will definitely be used as cannon fodder, so that Wuji Heavenly Palace can continue.

At that time, even if the forces such as Taisu Palace can survive, they will lose unimaginable, and it is possible to become a small force.

Then, they really have no chance to resist in the future.

In addition, almost seventy percent of the resources of the Infinite Domain have fallen into the hands of the Infinite Heavenly Palace, and the major forces are unable to develop and grow, who wants to continue to endure?

Wuji Heavenly Palace didn't give Taisu Palace and other forces a way to live, so they naturally took a risk.

If it succeeds and divides up the resources of the Infinite Heavenly Palace, all the major forces can rise again.

No matter how bad it is, it's a big deal to return to the Ancient War, and if Wuji Heavenly Palace wants to use them as cannon fodder, it is absolutely impossible.

Another time passed.

Miao An and the others, the geniuses of the Dao Realm, came out of the Xuanlin Mountain Realm, and they were all very nervous, and no one knew if they had won one of the six places.

Soon, the quota was announced.

......

"I got one of the six places!!"

Miao An was overjoyed, but judging from the announced places, she was the sixth place, that is, Kankan won the place, and she was almost eliminated.

And under the great joy, she also gave a lot of rewards to the surviving Supreme Dao Realm.

For example, the two-pattern Zhidao armor was directly gifted.

The resources obtained in the Xuanlin Mountain Realm are also given a lot, and there are other rewards, and even these Dao Realm requirements can be made, as long as they are not too excessive, she will agree to them one by one.

Ye Tian couldn't look down on the resources given by Miao'an, after all, the resources he obtained in the Xuanlin Mountain Realm were unimaginable to Miao'an.

However, he lacks a legacy.
